search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG136 home blood pressure monitoring average readings technique review
site:dha.gov.ae home blood pressure review hypertension
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic interpretation of unvalidated home readings
automatic target, medicine change, or referral
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: The device, cuff, technique, schedule, artifacts, and clinical context require clinician validation.
No target, diagnosis, treatment, medicine, dose, or referral was generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults with home blood-pressure readings being reviewed; pregnancy, paediatric, inpatient, and emergency contexts are outside scope.
setting_applicability: Primary and outpatient review of HBPM data.
UAE_applicability: International NICE evidence requires UAE diagnostic thresholds, device standards, prescribing, referral, and facility-policy adaptation.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG136 last updated 2026-02-26 was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: NG136 is the current NICE hypertension guideline.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The NICE section supports documenting HBPM source, measurement schedule, discarded first day, averaged readings, clinic comparison, and clinician interpretation without automatically diagnosing hypertension.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The monitoring section supports documenting self-monitoring, technique discussion, symptoms, medicine discussion, patient support, and arranged follow-up without generating targets or advice.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Severe blood-pressure features were reviewed as prompts; no diagnosis or same-day referral is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.

unresolved_source_gaps: Device and calibration, cuff, technique, dates and times, rest, posture, arm, duplicate readings, first-day exclusion, averages, symptoms, adherence, clinic comparison, interpretation, diagnosis, target, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
